description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers, predominantly white in color, with visible signs of wear and dirt, especially around the toe and sole areas. The shoes feature a classic lace-up design with perforations on the toe box for breathability and a prominent swoosh logo on the side panels. The midsoles and outsoles are thick and textured, providing cushioning and grip, while the overall silhouette is rounded and robust. The interior lining appears to be padded for comfort, and the heel counter is reinforced for added support. The shoes are constructed from synthetic leather with rubber soles, and the stitching and paneling are clearly visible. These sneakers are suitable for casual urban wear and are designed for comfort and durability.
description: A pair of white, low-top athletic sneakers with visible wear, lace-up closure, and a swoosh logo on the sides. The shoes have perforated toe boxes, thick rubber soles, and padded interiors.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the lace-up closure, perforated toe box, swoosh logo, and visible dirt on the toe and sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel counters, back stitching, and the overall shape of the shoes' heels.
description_view_2: Side and partial rear view displaying the swoosh logo, side panel stitching, and the curvature of the sole.
description_view_3: Angled front view focusing on the laces, toe box perforations, and the overall symmetry of the pair.
attribute_logo: Embossed swoosh logo on the side panels, same color as the shoe (white).
